name: [iam-jit] Heartbeat gap (audit pipeline went silent)
message:
The iam-jit Bounce audit-export channel went silent — the `heartbeat_gap` rule (issue #264) fired.

A heartbeat gap means the bouncer process may have been killed mid-session, OR the webhook target was unreachable for longer than the configured `heartbeat_missing_count` threshold. The SIEM view of bouncer activity is incomplete until the gap is resolved.

Investigate: process status on the bouncer host, webhook target reachability, recent admin-action events for context.

@your-team-here

options.escalation_message: Heartbeat gap still active. The bouncer audit channel is silent.
